componentDescription: A versatile component for building structured and interactive navigation menus for web applications.

items.description: An optional array of `NavigationItem` objects, used to define the structure and content of the navigation menu.

children.description: An optional React node that can be rendered inside the `NavigationMenu` component, allowing for flexible content placement.

orientation.description: Defines the visual orientation of the navigation menu, such as 'horizontal' or 'vertical'.

size.description: Specifies the visual size of the navigation menu, affecting its overall dimensions.

variant.description: Determines the visual style or variant of the navigation menu, allowing for different appearances.

onItemActivate.description: A callback function triggered when a navigation item is activated, providing the ID of the activated item as a parameter.

views.description: An optional object used to apply custom styling to different parts of the navigation menu component.
